### Review guide

This project uses [Conventional Comments](https://conventionalcomments.org/). Please label review comments:

| Label | Use for |
|-------|---------|
| `praise:` | Something done well |
| `suggestion:` | Proposed improvement with reasoning |
| `issue:` | A specific problem (pair with a suggestion) |
| `question:` | Seeking clarification |
| `nitpick:` | Trivial preference (non-blocking) |
| `todo:` | Small necessary change |
| `thought:` | Non-blocking idea |
| `chore:` | Simple task required before merge |

Add `(blocking)` or `(non-blocking)` to clarify whether the comment should prevent merge.

Example: `suggestion (non-blocking): Consider using a const here for clarity.`
